allow:
Bash(powershell -c "
# Move all loose audio files (mp3, wav)
Get-ChildItem -Path ''.'' -MaxDepth 1 -File | Where-Object { $_Extension -in ''.mp3'',''.wav'' } | ForEach-Object { Move-Item -Path $_FullName -Destination ''archived'' }
")

Bash(powershell -c "
# Move JSX files
Move-Item -Path ''lockdown (1).jsx'' -Destination ''archived''
Move-Item -Path ''lockdown_artifact.jsx'' -Destination ''archived''
Move-Item -Path ''lockdown_artifact_backup.jsx'' -Destination ''archived''
Move-Item -Path ''lockdown_artifact_pre_sprite_system.jsx'' -Destination ''archived''
Move-Item -Path ''lockdown_integrated.jsx'' -Destination ''archived''
")
Bash(cd "C:/Users/direl/BJJ 16bit game" && npm ls puppeteer 2>&1 | head -3)
Bash(rm "/c/Users/direl/BJJ 16bit game/fix_faces.js" && cd "/c/Users/direl/BJJ 16bit game/lockdown-deploy" && npx vercel --prod --yes 2>&1)
